title.rendered: Porta Cabin in HSR Layout: SAMAN’s Factory-Direct Site Cabins for 7-Sector Tenant Fitouts, 27th Main Retail-Spine & Sarjapur-Edge Startup Build Sites

content.rendered:
Buying a porta cabin in HSR Layout starts with knowing which sector you’re installing in. The seven BDA-developed sectors, the 27th Main commercial spine, the 14th Main and 17th Cross retail strip, the Sarjapur Road eastern edge with its tech-corridor adjacency, and the Agara Lake catchment on the east — these are not interchangeable backdrops. A Sector 6 Sarjapur-edge startup-HQ early-stage fitout, a 27th Main F&B tenant fitout, an inner-Sector co-working tenant change-over, a BDA-stage apartment-redevelopment site office, and a 14th Cross retail-shop fitout each order a different cabin spec — and each makes use of the proximity SAMAN’s Gopasandra unit (Sy No 34/2, Anekal Taluk, roughly 12–18 km away via Hosur Road through Bommanahalli–Hosa Road or via NICE Road to ORR) gives you on lead time and on warranty-call service-vehicle reach.

Quick note on language. A porta cabin here means a factory-built, factory-finished steel cabin delivered ready-to-install to your HSR site — not the “private cabin” rented inside an HSR coworking campus. Different product, different brief.

HSR Layout in Seven BDA Sectors and Three Functional Zones: Why the Sector 1 / 14th Main / 17th Cross Commercial Spine, the Sector 6–7 Sarjapur-Edge Startup Belt, and the Inner-Sector BDA-Residential Mixed-Use Grid Each Set a Different Porta Cabin Brief Before You Compare Price

The Bangalore Development Authority laid out HSR Layout in seven numbered sectors in the mid-1980s, with main roads running north–south and cross roads east–west — a near-orthogonal grid that still defines how access works for any delivery vehicle bringing a porta cabin into the locality. The 27th Main runs through the heart of Sector 1 as the de-facto commercial spine, with retail and F&B frontages on both sides. The 14th Main and 17th Cross perform a similar job at smaller scale across Sectors 2 through 4. The Sarjapur Outer Ring Road frontage marks the eastern boundary of Sectors 6 and 7, sliding into the Sarjapur Road tech corridor and the early-stage startup ecosystem that historically incubated Flipkart, Razorpay, Zerodha and a long tail of seed-stage tech operators. Agara Lake sits to the east of Sector 4 with a BBMP-administered catchment edge.

Three functional zones emerge from this grid. The commercial spine runs along 27th Main, 14th Main, 17th Cross and the Sarjapur-Road eastern edge — these are where retail-shop, F&B-cafe, clinic, dental, diagnostic and small managed-office fitouts cluster. The Sarjapur-edge tech-startup belt sits across Sectors 6 and 7, leaning into the Outer Ring Road and the tech-park overflow east of HSR. The inner-Sector residential mixed-use grid covers most of Sectors 2 through 5 — BDA-allotted plot lanes, apartment-redevelopment building sites, and the co-working and co-living tenant ecosystems that have densified across the inner blocks. Each zone takes a different cabin spec and a different delivery brief.

Five HSR Layout Porta Cabin Buyer Profiles: Why a Sarjapur-Edge Startup-HQ Early-Stage Fitout, a 27th Main F&B-or-Clinic Tenant Fitout, an Inner-Sector Co-Working / Co-Living Tenant Change-Over, a BDA-Stage Apartment-Redevelopment Site Office, and a 14th / 17th Cross Commercial-Frontage Retail-Shop Fitout Each Order a Different Spec

Profile A — Sarjapur-edge startup-HQ early-stage fitout. Seed and pre-Series-A tech operators settling on the Sector 6 or Sector 7 Outer Ring Road frontage or just inside the Sarjapur Road tech corridor typically want a multi-room MS porta cabin in HSR Layout that gives 6 to 18 seats, a discussion booth, and a basic pantry — usually a 20×10 or 20×16 ft unit on MS frame with 50mm PUF panel walls and roof, GI flooring, and factory-fitted electricals (LED panel lights, AC point, 6/16A sockets, network conduit). Quick lead time matters more than premium finish at this stage.

Profile B — 27th Main F&B or clinic tenant fitout. Cafes, juice bars, fast-casual restaurants, dental clinics, diagnostic centres and small managed-office tenants taking up retail-frontage plots on 27th Main or 14th Main typically want a single-unit 10×10 or 12×12 ft cabin — factory-finished interior with vinyl or laminate flooring, basic plumbing for a wash basin, and an external signage face. SAMAN’s HSR delivery is drawn from a wider range of porta cabins for project sites delivered across India, with the HSR variant tightening on what fits a Sector commercial-frontage plot.

Profile C — Inner-Sector co-working / co-living tenant change-over. When a co-working or co-living operator (or the building owner reshuffling tenants between leases) needs a quick interim cabin during fit-out turnover — typically a 10×10 ft single-room with a single-window AC, used as a temporary admin or reception unit while the main floor is being re-laid. Six to ten weeks is a common deployment window; the cabin moves out cleanly when the new tenant takes over.

Profile D — BDA-stage apartment-redevelopment site office. Builders working an apartment-redevelopment plot on a BDA-allotted parcel inside HSR — Sectors 2 through 5 mostly — order a contractor site office for 6 to 12 months of build cycle. Common spec is a 20×10 ft MS-frame unit with two compartments (engineer plus supervisor), AC, and factory-finished interior. Apartment-redev and Sarjapur-edge startup-HQ buyers wanting a higher-finish brief commonly specify the multi-room luxury porta cabin variant our HSR apartment-redev and Sarjapur-edge startup-HQ buyers typically specify — wooden-feature interior, fire-rated finish, executive layout.

Profile E — 14th / 17th Cross commercial-frontage retail-shop fitout. Small retail-shop tenants taking up a frontage plot on 14th Cross, 17th Cross, or one of the inner Sector cross-roads — typically an 8×8 to 10×10 ft single-room unit, with a single shutter face or open front, used as a retail kiosk, parcel-counter, ATM-style unit, or branded brand-launch pop-up.

Porta Cabin Price in HSR Layout in 2026: Four INR Bands by Buyer Profile, with GST and Gopasandra Transport Already Inside the Number

The porta cabin price in HSR Layout in 2026 splits into four real bands when you separate by buyer profile rather than by cabin size. SAMAN publishes these bands with GST (18% on prefab structures) and one-way Gopasandra-to-HSR-Layout road transport already inside the figure — so the number you compare is the number you pay. No ambush invoice on delivery.

Buyer Profile (HSR) Typical Spec Footprint Starting INR (incl. GST + transport)
14th / 17th Cross retail-shop fitout MS frame + 50mm PUF + GI flooring 8×8 to 10×10 ft, single-room ₹85,000 onwards
27th Main F&B or clinic tenant fitout MS frame + PUF + electricals + plumbing prep 10×10 to 12×12 ft, single-room ₹1,15,000 onwards
Co-working tenant change-over OR apartment-redev site office MS frame + PUF + AC + 2-compartment layout 20×10 ft, two-compartment ₹1,85,000 onwards
Sarjapur-edge startup-HQ multi-room OR apartment-redev executive MS frame + PUF + wooden-feature + fire-rated finish 20×16 to 30×10 ft, multi-room ₹3,25,000 onwards

Each band is an entry point, not a ceiling. Add-ons that change the number meaningfully include wooden flooring upgrades, a separate toilet compartment with septic prep, weather-grade external paint, additional roof insulation for direct-sun east-edge Sarjapur-side sites, separate AC capacity per room, and an external signage face mounted to the frontage side. Customisation does not change the warranty triplet (5-year structural frame; 1–2 years on finishes).

When you’re ready to buy porta cabin in HSR Layout direct from the factory, you can pull the full size, spec, and configuration sheet from the SAMAN factory-direct porta cabin price sheet covering HSR-Layout-bound Bangalore orders — the same spec sheet our procurement team works off when issuing a Gopasandra-to-HSR dispatch.

How Long Does It Take to Deliver a Porta Cabin from Gopasandra to HSR Layout — Through Hosur Road–Bommanahalli–Hosa Road or NICE Road and ORR — and What the Same Service-Vehicle Reach Means When Your Cabin Needs Help

Most HSR Layout porta cabins reach the site within 60 to 120 minutes of factory dispatch from SAMAN’s Gopasandra unit (Sy No 34/2, Anekal Taluk) — roughly 12 to 18 km away. The faster route is Hosur Road through Bommanahalli onto Hosa Road then into HSR Sectors; the alternate runs via NICE Road to Outer Ring Road for east-Sector sites near the Sarjapur edge. A 5 AM dispatch window avoids the Silk Board peak.

In practice, route choice depends on which sector and which Cross your site sits on. For Sectors 1, 2, 3, and 4 — the commercial spine and the inner mixed-use core — the Hosur Road through Bommanahalli into Hosa Road approach lands closest to the 14th Main and 17th Cross arterials. For Sectors 5, 6, and 7 on the eastern Sarjapur Road / ORR edge, the NICE Road to Outer Ring Road approach is usually quicker once the cabin clears the NICE Road south exit.

The same proximity governs warranty service-vehicle reach. SAMAN runs same-Karnataka, same-Anekal-Taluk service vehicles from the Gopasandra unit — a service-engineer turnaround into HSR Layout typically lands inside the 90-minute-to-2-hour ETA window for in-warranty calls, and same-day for urgent calls. An IndiaMart-listed supplier dispatching from Greater Noida, Pune, Mumbai or Surat cannot operationally match this geometry — the freight time alone consumes most of the warranty-response window before a service engineer even arrives on site. Same-day, same-state, same-factory positioning is the practical difference an HSR Layout buyer feels first at delivery, and feels again every time the cabin needs help.

BBMP Bommanahalli Zone Temporary-Structure Approval, KSPCB Agara Lake Catchment Sensitivity, and 27th Main / Sector Cross-Road Lane-Width Feasibility: Three Permission and Access Layers That Decide Whether Your HSR Layout Porta Cabin Goes Live in 5–7 Days or Stalls 5–7 Weeks

Three permission-and-access layers shape every HSR Layout porta cabin installation. They are usually the difference between a 5-to-7-day site-ready outcome and a 5-to-7-week stall.

Layer 1 — BBMP Bommanahalli zone temporary-structure approval. HSR Layout falls under BBMP Bommanahalli zone — not BBMP East and not BBMP Mahadevapura, a useful distinction for builders who deal across multiple Bangalore neighbourhoods because the temporary-structure desks sit in different ward offices. Permission for site offices and frontage cabins routes through Bommanahalli ward-office desks. Most clean cases resolve in 4–8 working days. Frontage cabins on 27th Main may attract an additional traffic-and-transport circle review where the cabin obstructs lane sight-lines.

Layer 2 — KSPCB Agara Lake catchment sensitivity. Plots in the Sector 4 east-facing edge, Sector 5 inner east, and the Sarjapur-side stretch of Sectors 6 and 7 closer to Agara Lake can attract a KSPCB compliance review on temporary-structure placement — particularly if the cabin sits on a plot draining toward the lake bund. Most cabins clear cleanly, but the review adds 7–10 working days where it triggers. We recommend confirming Agara-catchment status with the Bommanahalli ward office before dispatch.

Layer 3 — Lane-width feasibility on 27th Main and inner Sector cross-roads. The 27th Main has reasonable carrying capacity for a 20-ft cabin on a flatbed, but inner Sector cross-roads (especially the older 7th, 14th, 17th and 24th Cross stretches) often constrain to 25–30 ft of clear lane width with parking on both sides. A 20×10 ft or 20×16 ft cabin needs a clear approach window for unloading and a swing radius for the flatbed boom. For tight-lane sites, the 10×10 ft or 12×12 ft single-room spec is operationally safer; we’d rather adjust the spec to fit the lane at order than discover the constraint at the site gate.

The 5-Year Structural Frame and 1–2-Year Finishes Warranty from SAMAN POS India Private Limited: What Same-Karnataka, Same-Anekal-Taluk Service-Vehicle Reach from Our Gopasandra Unit Means When Your HSR Layout Porta Cabin Needs Help in Year One or Year Five

Every porta cabin SAMAN POS India Private Limited dispatches to HSR Layout from Gopasandra ships with a clear warranty triplet — and the warranty triplet is not the same thing as the engineered service life.

The 5-year structural frame warranty covers the MS frame, base channels, roof framing, and load-bearing welds — the load-carrying skeleton. Structural integrity is guaranteed for five years from dispatch.

The 1–2-year finishes warranty covers PUF panels, electrical fittings (factory-fitted LED panels, sockets, switchboards, AC points, network conduit), plumbing where supplied, interior wall and floor laminates, doors and windows, and exterior paint. Standard cover is one year; extension to two years is available on request at order.

The engineered service life is separate, and it is longer: 20 to 25 years with routine maintenance — annual paint refresh, periodic re-sealing of roof joints, AC servicing. Service life is a design lifespan, not a warranty period; they should never be conflated.

SAMAN’s HSR Layout warranty support runs out of Gopasandra. Service-engineer dispatch from a 12–18 km radius lands inside the 90-minute-to-2-hour ETA window for typical warranty calls, and same-day for urgent calls. A cross-state supplier dispatching from outside Karnataka cannot match this — the freight time alone consumes most of the response window before a service engineer even arrives on site.

Frequently Asked Questions: Porta Cabin in HSR Layout

Can SAMAN deliver a porta cabin from Gopasandra to HSR Layout in a single day, and is the same-day delivery dependent on which sector my site is in?

Yes — for clean cases where the cabin is built and signed off in the factory, a single-day Gopasandra-to-HSR dispatch is normal. The unit goes from our Sy No 34/2 Anekal Taluk yard, runs the 12–18 km road distance via Hosur Road through Bommanahalli or via NICE Road to Outer Ring Road, and lands at site within 60–120 minutes of factory dispatch. Same-day works in any of the seven sectors with a 5 AM dispatch start; afternoon dispatch into Sectors 6 and 7 via NICE-ORR is slower than morning dispatch into Sectors 1–4 via Hosur Road because of the Silk Board peak.

Which porta cabin spec actually fits an inner-Sector HSR cross-road plot — say 7th, 14th, or 17th Cross — without a lane-width problem?

For most older inner-Sector cross-road plots in HSR (typically 25–30 ft of clear lane width with parked vehicles on both sides), a 10×10 ft or 12×12 ft single-room unit is operationally safest. A 20×10 ft cabin can be installed but needs a clear approach window for unloading and a coordinated traffic-pause for the flatbed swing radius. Always confirm the approach lane and the on-plot unloading footprint with our dispatch team before order. We’d rather adjust the spec to a tighter unit at order than discover the constraint at site.

Do I need BBMP Bommanahalli permission for an HSR Layout porta cabin site office, and does the Agara Lake catchment add any extra compliance step?

HSR Layout falls under BBMP Bommanahalli zone, so temporary-structure approval for site offices and frontage cabins routes through the Bommanahalli ward office — typically 4–8 working days for a clean case. Plots on the Agara Lake catchment edge (Sector 4 east, Sector 5 inner east, Sarjapur-side Sectors 6–7 closer to the lake bund) can attract a KSPCB compliance review where the cabin sits on a plot draining toward the lake — adding 7–10 working days where it triggers. We recommend confirming Agara-catchment status with the Bommanahalli ward office before dispatch.

What does a 27th Main or 14th Main HSR Layout commercial-frontage porta cabin typically cost, and what’s actually included in the number?

A 27th Main or 14th Main commercial-frontage cabin (10×10 to 12×12 ft single-room, factory-finished interior, basic plumbing prep for a wash basin, external signage face) starts at ₹1,15,000 onwards — inclusive of 18% GST on the prefab structure and one-way Gopasandra-to-HSR road transport. The figure includes the MS frame, 50mm PUF panel walls and roof, GI flooring, and factory-fitted LED panel lights, sockets, switchboards, AC point and network conduit. Add-ons (wooden flooring upgrade, separate toilet compartment with septic prep, weather-grade external paint, additional roof insulation) are quoted line-by-line at order.

Get Your HSR Layout Porta Cabin Quote — Direct from Our Gopasandra Factory

Send us the sector, the rough cabin footprint, and the buyer profile (or paste this page back in the message with your sector marked) and we’ll come back with a spec-and-price reply inside one working day — direct from our Gopasandra factory, no aggregator markup.

Bangalore: Call +91 80886 85440 · WhatsApp +91 88616 22859

Delhi NCR: Call +91 87960 39938 · WhatsApp +91 97089 89937“

author.description: Aman Dubey is the lead marketing and copywriting expert at Saman Portable, specializing in prefabricated, shipping-container, and modular structures. With over 15 years of industry experience, Aman has helped global clients optimize design, streamline production, and amplify brand visibility through data-driven content and strategic SEO. Under his guidance, Saman Portable has become a trusted name in container office solutions and turnkey prefabricated buildings across India and beyond.
